key.name: show-five-hour
key.summary: Show the 5-hour usage percentage in the top bar
key.description: If enabled, the top bar includes the current 5-hour Codex usage percentage.

key.name: show-weekly
key.summary: Show the weekly usage percentage in the top bar
key.description: If enabled, the top bar includes the current weekly Codex usage percentage.

key.name: top-bar-display-mode
key.description: Controls whether the top bar shows usage percentages, split progress bars, or a unified progress bar.

key.name: background-refresh-interval-minutes
key.description: Controls how often the extension refreshes Codex usage data in the background. Set to 0 to disable scheduled refreshes and rely on manual refresh only.
